option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <component name="ProjectRunConfigurationManager"> <configuration default="false" name="Frontend (Dev)" type="js.build_tools.npm" nameIsGenerated="false"> <package-json value="$PROJECT_DIR$/EstudaMais/package.json" /> <command value="run" /> <scripts> <script value="dev" /> </scripts> <node-interpreter value="project" /> <envs /> <method v="2" /> </configuration> </component>
